output: Executed batch 3 of 6 for T4 only. Added crop fields to the clip type/model, both timeline-data load/save mappings, the serialized clip whitelist, and the reset-position callback so crop values can round-trip and be cleared correctly. Checkpointed the batch result to `.megaplan/plans/fix-the-video-editor-s-20260325-1831/execution_batch_3.json`.

task_updates.executor_notes: Added `cropTop`, `cropBottom`, `cropLeft`, and `cropRight` to the `TimelineClip` type, the `ClipMeta` interface, the clip-to-meta load mapping in `getDefaultClipMeta`, the meta-to-clip save mapping in `rowsToConfig`, and the `TIMELINE_CLIP_FIELDS` whitelist. Also updated `handleResetClipPosition` to clear all four crop fields so reset removes crop as well as position/size overrides. Verified each required site directly after patching.

sense_check_acknowledgments.executor_note: Confirmed the crop fields exist in all required persistence and reset locations: `TimelineClip`, `ClipMeta`, `getDefaultClipMeta`, the `rowsToConfig` serialization mapping, and `TIMELINE_CLIP_FIELDS`, with `handleResetClipPosition` also clearing all four crop keys. This closes both load/save directions and the validation gate.
